caption: The video features a man standing behind a microphone, addressing an audience. He is wearing glasses and a white shirt with a black vest adorned with colorful embroidery. The man appears to be speaking or singing into the microphone while holding a small object, possibly a tambourine or a similar instrument, in his hand. The setting seems to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background. The audience, partially visible in the foreground, is attentively listening to him. The overall atmosphere suggests a formal or cultural event, possibly involving music or storytelling. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen.
